other_observers: Brenda Wright, James Beatty, Stephen & Emilee Tarnowski, Erik Hendrikson, Linda Raczek, Carolyn Gunn.
specific_location: SE of Yucca House National Monument at the west end of B Road
description: Mike Thompson found the kite and reported it to us. Kite did not call. Kite spent most of the observed time perched. On one occasion the Kite caught some sort of prey item and perched on a post to eat it.Small kite, mostly white, silvery upper parts, white below including tail, and dark patch through eye. Most noticeable was a black wing partch when perched and in flight on the upper wing. In fight from underneath the light feathers were gray and a dark patch could be seen in mid-wing.
photographer: Photographer: Brenda Wright, Brenda Wright, Brenda Wright
